zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stotesbury於大約1484年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福時，他的父親William De Stotesbury26歲，母親Elizabeth Falconer8歲。他於大約1504年與Mrs. John Stotesbury在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1538年在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stotesbury于大约1484年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福时，他的父亲William De Stotesbury26岁，母亲Elizabeth Falconer8岁。他于大约1504年与Mrs. John Stotesbury在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1538年在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stotesbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stuchbury
meanings: English: locative name from Stuchbury (Northants), recorded as Stotesburi in 1284.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Stotesbury was born about 1484, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Stotesbury, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Falconer, was 8. He married Mrs. John Stotesbury about 1504, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1538, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stotesbury est né environ 1484, à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Stotesbury, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Falconer, avait 8 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. John Stotesbury environ 1504, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1538, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stotesbury um 1484 in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Stotesbury 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Falconer 8. Er hat um 1504 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. John Stotesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1538 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stotesbury è nato il circa 1484 nel Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William De Stotesbury, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Falconer, aveva 8 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. John Stotesbury circa 1504, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1538, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブ

ja.lifeSummary: John Stotesburyが約1484年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブで生まれた時，父William De Stotesburyは26歳，母Elizabeth Falconerは8歳であった。約1504年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでMrs. John Stotesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1538年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stotesbury(이)가 대략 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Stotesbury(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Falconer(은)는 8세였다. 그는 대략 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Mrs. John Stotesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1538년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stotesbury nasceu aproximadamente 1484, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Stotesbury, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Falconer, tinha 8 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. John Stotesbury aproximadamente 1504, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1538, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stotesbury родился около 1484 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Stotesbury было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Falconer, 8. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. John Stotesbury около 1504 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1538 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stotesbury nació aproximadamente 1484, en Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William De Stotesbury, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Falconer, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Mrs. John Stotesbury aproximadamente 1504, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1538, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
